title: Xenial Hearty Russian Mushroom Pilaf
description: A pungent and cozy Russian dish featuring marjoram and ferment-kimchi, perfect for a cold winter night, this vegan-friendly pilaf is a hearty and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the dried marjoram and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped ferment-kimchi and cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the uncooked brown rice and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the low sodium vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
